name: Rakibul Alam Nahin
profile: I have been working on Artificial Intelligence since 2020 and have gathered extensive knowledge regarding the field of Computer Vision, NLP and LLMs through my projects, academics and internship programs like Truuth. Additionally I have 1 year experience in web and mobile applications development while working as a Full stack software developer in Brac Bank and Shoplover in with React JS, Node JS SQL/NoSQL database. I am very good with communication and always try to understand my goal rather than just my task.

exp_description: Researched on high performance text classification and extraction techniques with multiple LLMs like Llama Mavrick, Claude Haiku using AWS Bedrock and AWS Textract.
Used python regex PyMuPDF for text extraction, text data analysis and augmentation of various types of documents/images for converting unstructured PDF/Image data into structured JSON formats.

Used Claude Opus 4.7 to build a prototype orchestration of connecting multiple API with the resume extraction pipeline for a Adverse Media Sanction Project. Used python flask for creating backed with Postgre SQL and redis integration.
Performed data collection, ground truth, accuracy techniques(TRP, FNN), repeated analysis and Unit Testing achieve >99% accuracy.
Developed a banking software product prototype using HTML, CSS, Javascript for frontend and JavaEE, Struts for backend development. Used java string parsing and Ad-Hoc optimization methods.
Schema design efficient MySQL query function and REST API endpoints for data transfer.
Enabled security and authentication protocols (Biometric Auth, OAuth).
Performed QA testing with team and supervisor and submitted whole prototype.

pro_description: Tourism-focused chatbot using LLaMA-7B incorporated Hybrid RAG using LangChain and Neo4j for information extraction. Designed for faster responses to personalized travel suggestions. Used python, PyTorch and transformer-based architecture, parameter based fine-tuning. Designed UI with React JS

Collected own data and processed with image augmentation techniques then used YOLOv10 model to for testing the TurtleBot activity using ROS2. Finally trained ResNet-50 and Swin Transformer for bottle classification on custom dataset with 97% confidence and deployed to detect and act on recognition.

value: AI/ML: LLMs (Training, Fine-tuning & Optimization), GenAI(Claude Opus, Llama Mavrick, ChatGPT, Gemini, Github Copilot), Natural Language Processing (NLP), Prompt Engineering, Computer Vision (CV, DeeplabV3, VLM), Deep Learning and Machine Learning
Agentic AI and Automations: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), Agentic Workflows, N8N, Transformer Architectures, Relevence AI.
Tools & Frameworks: LangChain, LangGraph, FAISS, ChromaDB, Hugging Face, PyTorch, TensorFlow, PySpark, OpenClaw, Vector Database, Tesseract OCR

education.edu_details: Successful in knowledge and skills for perfect AI Engineering
